news.title:
HUDCO confirms Rs. 206.8 Cr interest payment for 2011 Tax-Free Bonds Series 2 on 05.03.2026.
Payment processed via IDFC First Bank; record date for bondholders was 18.02.2026.
news.summary:
HUDCO confirms Rs. 206.8 Cr interest payment for 2011 Tax-Free Bonds Series 2 on 05.03.2026.
Payment processed via IDFC First Bank; record date for bondholders was 18.02.2026.

news.title:
Nifty opened below 25,600, with Sensex down 360 points.
HUDCO and One Mobikwik are in focus during market opening.
news.summary:
Nifty opened below 25,600, with Sensex down 360 points.
HUDCO and One Mobikwik are in focus during market opening.

news.title:
BSE will remove HUDCO, Piramal Pharma, Tata Tech, and Torrent Pharma from F&O segment.
No new contracts for these stocks will be introduced from May 4, 2026.
news.summary:
BSE will remove HUDCO, Piramal Pharma, Tata Tech, and Torrent Pharma from F&O segment.
No new contracts for these stocks will be introduced from May 4, 2026.

news.title: HUDCO aims to achieve a 3% Net Interest Margin by FY26, per CNBC TV18.
news.summary: HUDCO aims to achieve a 3% Net Interest Margin by FY26, per CNBC TV18.

news.title:
HUDCO confirmed timely payment of Rs. 97.7 cr interest on Tax-Free Bonds 2012 Tranche on 16.02.2026.
Payment was made via ICICI Bank to bondholders as per record date 23.01.2026, fulfilling SEBI LODR Regulation 57.
news.summary:
HUDCO confirmed timely payment of Rs. 97.7 cr interest on Tax-Free Bonds 2012 Tranche on 16.02.2026.
Payment was made via ICICI Bank to bondholders as per record date 23.01.2026, fulfilling SEBI LODR Regulation 57.

news.title: Hudco plans to raise ₹14.42 bln through debentures to boost finances.
news.summary: Hudco plans to raise ₹14.42 bln through debentures to boost finances.

news.title:
HUDCO approves Rs.1442 crore perpetual debentures under Series 1, 2025-26.
Debentures carry a 7.87% coupon, with first interest payment on 13.02.2027.
news.summary:
HUDCO approves Rs.1442 crore perpetual debentures under Series 1, 2025-26.
Debentures carry a 7.87% coupon, with first interest payment on 13.02.2027.

news.title:
Fitch affirms HUDCO's long-term issuer rating at BBB with a stable outlook, linked to India's sovereign rating.
HUDCO's rating reflects strong government backing, improved asset quality, and robust profitability.
news.summary:
Fitch affirms HUDCO's long-term issuer rating at BBB with a stable outlook, linked to India's sovereign rating.
HUDCO's rating reflects strong government backing, improved asset quality, and robust profitability.

news.title:
HUDCO plans to issue perpetual, unsecured, non-convertible bonds worth Rs 500 crore via private placement, with a green shoe option up to Rs 1,000 crore.
The bonds, rated CARE AAA (Stable), are eligible for Tier I/II capital, listed on BSE, and have a 10-year call option with RBI approval.
news.summary:
HUDCO plans to issue perpetual, unsecured, non-convertible bonds worth Rs 500 crore via private placement, with a green shoe option up to Rs 1,000 crore.
The bonds, rated CARE AAA (Stable), are eligible for Tier I/II capital, listed on BSE, and have a 10-year call option with RBI approval.

news.title: Hudco plans $2B overseas borrowing to support urban infra development.
news.summary: Hudco plans $2B overseas borrowing to support urban infra development.

news.title:
HUDCO has paid interest and redemption amount for its 2015 Tax-Free Bonds by the due date, 07-02-2026.
The redemption amount of Rs. 245.7 Cr and interest of Rs. 17.5 Cr were processed via ICICI Bank.
news.summary:
HUDCO has paid interest and redemption amount for its 2015 Tax-Free Bonds by the due date, 07-02-2026.
The redemption amount of Rs. 245.7 Cr and interest of Rs. 17.5 Cr were processed via ICICI Bank.

news.title:
HUDCO's Rs. 4500 crore Tier 1 Bonds receive 'ACUITE AAA' Stable rating, reflecting strong GoI ownership.
HUDCO reports PAT growth of 28% YoY in FY25, with GNPA reduced to 1.67% and AUM rising 35% to Rs. 1,24,828 crore.
news.summary:
HUDCO's Rs. 4500 crore Tier 1 Bonds receive 'ACUITE AAA' Stable rating, reflecting strong GoI ownership.
HUDCO reports PAT growth of 28% YoY in FY25, with GNPA reduced to 1.67% and AUM rising 35% to Rs. 1,24,828 crore.

news.title:
HUDCO targets 3 lakh crore loan book by 2030, with 50,000 crore disbursement in FY26.
Net NPA reduced to 0.06%. FCNR borrowing impact to end post Q4 FY26.
news.summary:
HUDCO targets 3 lakh crore loan book by 2030, with 50,000 crore disbursement in FY26.
Net NPA reduced to 0.06%. FCNR borrowing impact to end post Q4 FY26.

news.title:
HUDCO shared the audio recording of its earnings call held on 4th Feb 2026.
The recording is available on HUDCO's website as per SEBI compliance guidelines.
news.summary:
HUDCO shared the audio recording of its earnings call held on 4th Feb 2026.
The recording is available on HUDCO's website as per SEBI compliance guidelines.

news.title:
HUDCO shares dropped 5.9%, closing at 191.65 on Jan 30, amid valuation pressures.
The decline stems from flat financials and low investor participation, despite strong fundamentals.
news.summary:
HUDCO shares dropped 5.9%, closing at 191.65 on Jan 30, amid valuation pressures.
The decline stems from flat financials and low investor participation, despite strong fundamentals.

news.title:
Housing & Urban Development Corp Ltd declared 11 dividend with ex-date Feb 6, 2026.
The company has shown strong long-term positive performance in total returns.
news.summary:
Housing & Urban Development Corp Ltd declared 11 dividend with ex-date Feb 6, 2026.
The company has shown strong long-term positive performance in total returns.

news.title:
HUDCO confirms payment of Rs. 87.3 crore interest on 8.38% S.A. Fully Serviced Bonds due 30 Jan 2026.
Payment was processed via IndusInd Bank for bondholders listed as of 15 Jan 2026 record date.
news.summary:
HUDCO confirms payment of Rs. 87.3 crore interest on 8.38% S.A. Fully Serviced Bonds due 30 Jan 2026.
Payment was processed via IndusInd Bank for bondholders listed as of 15 Jan 2026 record date.

news.title:
HUDCO released Q3 and 9-month FY26 financial results presentation.
Highlights include operations, financials, sector outlook, ESG, and govt partnership.
news.summary:
HUDCO released Q3 and 9-month FY26 financial results presentation.
Highlights include operations, financials, sector outlook, ESG, and govt partnership.

news.title:
HUDCO's Q3 net profit dips to ₹7.1B from ₹7.4B YoY.
Q3 revenue rises significantly to ₹34.3B from ₹27.6B YoY.
news.summary:
HUDCO's Q3 net profit dips to ₹7.1B from ₹7.4B YoY.
Q3 revenue rises significantly to ₹34.3B from ₹27.6B YoY.

news.title:
HUDCO's Board approved a 3rd interim dividend of Rs.1.15 per share and set February 7, 2026, as the record date.
HUDCO raised its annual borrowing plan for FY26 to Rs.80,000 crore and released unaudited financial results for Q3 FY26.
news.summary:
HUDCO's Board approved a 3rd interim dividend of Rs.1.15 per share and set February 7, 2026, as the record date.
HUDCO raised its annual borrowing plan for FY26 to Rs.80,000 crore and released unaudited financial results for Q3 FY26.
